recommendations.title: Lawless

recommendations.title: Triple 9
recommendations.overview: A gang of criminals and corrupt cops plan the murder of a police officer in order to pull off their biggest heist yet across town.

recommendations.title: The Road
recommendations.overview: A father and his son walk alone through burned America. Nothing moves in the ravaged landscape save the ash on the wind and water. It is cold enough to crack stones and, when the snow falls, it is gray. Their destination is the warmer south, although

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Rain Man
recommendations.overview: When car dealer Charlie Babbitt learns that his estranged father has died, he returns home to Cincinnati, where he discovers that he has a savant older brother named Raymond and that his father's $3 million fortune is being left to the mental institu

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Shadow of a Doubt
recommendations.overview: In sleepy Santa Rosa, restless young Charlie’s world brightens when her sophisticated Uncle Charlie arrives for a long visit. But as his behavior grows increasingly strange, she begins to suspect that her beloved uncle may be hiding a terrible secret

recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.
